name: mempalace
description: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

commands.name: mempalace:help
commands.description: Show MemPalace help — available tools, skills, architecture

commands.name: mempalace:init
commands.description: Set up MemPalace — install, configure MCP, onboard

commands.name: mempalace:search
commands.description: Search your memories across the palace

commands.name: mempalace:mine
commands.description: Mine projects and conversations into the palace

commands.name: mempalace:status
commands.description: Show palace overview — wings, rooms, drawer counts
